lead.$description: Lead body — opening paragraph / intro (larger, invites reading)

default.$description: Default body — regular paragraph text (最もよく使う)

emphasis.$description: Emphasis body — default size with stronger weight (意味的な強調、size は default と同じ)

helper.$description: Helper text — form helper, status message, secondary info

caption.$description: Caption — image caption, footnote, meta info (smallest readable body)
